codeReview.summary: Pass. The prior blocking `session_input_callback` bug is fixed: `prepare_input_with_session()` now preserves an explicit empty callback result instead of restoring `original_input`, and the runner persists only `session_input_items`, so replay suppression no longer leaks omitted new-turn items back into session storage. The diff also adds exact regression coverage for conversation-id delta replay, automatic previous-response chaining, session/server-managed conflict rejection, replay limits, callback rewrite behavior, and explicit empty-callback suppression.

summary: Re-reviewed the fixed feature against the prior blocking finding, current commit diff, latest handoff, and transcript skeleton. The empty `session_input_callback` suppression path now matches the contract: replay input can be intentionally emptied, and omitted new-turn items are not persisted back into session storage.
